name: hrbr
description: Local Harbor MCP surface for provider marketplace, workspace tools, cloud exec, traces, and context.

interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Harbor through the local hrbr MCP server for workspace state, provider marketplace discovery, plugin tools, cloud exec, traces, context, and setup diagnostics. The plugin ships Harbor usage guidance, a local MCP launcher, and a health check script for debugging Codex installs.
defaultPrompt: Check my Harbor workspace and available plugin tools
Use Harbor to inspect connected provider tools
Run a Harbor workspace smoke test
Show Harbor setup status and any missing local requirements
